raw_response:
Agree / Disagree?
I agree with the assessment presented in the justification. One additional point supporting the accuracy of option C involves the specific chemical mechanisms involved in polymerization processes unique to each class of elastomers. For instance, while all classes undergo some form of crosslinking, only addition siloxanes involve continuous chain growth via free radical reactions which leads to highly branched networks providing exceptional mechanical strength and dimensional stability over time. This further reinforces why addition silicones rank first in dimensional stability. My answer remains C. 
Answer Choice: C.
